subtasks.description: Query database to retrieve all active billing contracts with their contracted annual values
Extract all invoices issued in 2024 from the billing system and aggregate amounts by contract
Cross-reconcile contracted annual values against actual 2024 invoice totals and calculate variance percentages for all contracts
Identify and flag contracts with material variance greater than 10% (either positive or negative)
Compile a comprehensive reconciliation report with flagged contracts, variance details, and recommended actions

plan.cost_rationale: Small tier agents handle initial data fetching and extraction. Mid-tier agent performs the reconciliation cross-reference logic. Additional mid-tier agent flags material variances based on 10% threshold. Final mid-tier agent compiles policy-based report with recommendations.

output.sql: SELECT c.contract_id, c.vendor_name, c.contracted_annual_value, COALESCE(SUM(i.amount_usd), 0) as actual_invoiced_2024, CASE WHEN c.contracted_annual_value > 0 THEN ROUND(((c.contracted_annual_value - COALESCE(SUM(i.amount_usd), 0)) / c.contracted_annual_value * 100)::NUMERIC, 2) ELSE 0 END as variance_percent, CASE WHEN c.contracted_annual_value > 0 AND ABS((c.contracted_annual_value - COALESCE(SUM(i.amount_usd), 0)) / c.contracted_annual_value) > 0.10 THEN 'MATERIAL_VARIANCE' ELSE 'OK' END as variance_flag FROM (SELECT contract_id, vendor_name, amount_usd as contracted_annual_value FROM invoice_facts WHERE status = 'active') c LEFT JOIN invoice_facts i ON c.contract_id = i.contract_id AND i.invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND i.invoice_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY c.contract_id, c.vendor_name, c.contracted_annual_value ORDER BY variance_percent DESC

sql_value.description: SQL query constructed to reconcile contracted_annual_value against actual 2024 invoices with variance_percent and MATERIAL_VARIANCE flag
sql_value.note: SQL query definition provided but no result rows returned — no executable output available

mongo_value.message: Unable to extract invoice data - document content required

blocking_issues: fetch_invoices_2024 upstream returned an error — no invoice records available for 2024
fetch_contracts SQL query produced no result rows — contracted annual values unavailable
Without both data sources, variance_percent and MATERIAL_VARIANCE classification cannot be computed for any contract
required_to_complete: Provide actual invoice records for 2024 including invoice_id, contract_id, issue_date, amount_usd
Execute fetch_contracts SQL against a live database and return result rows
Re-run reconciliation once both upstream outputs contain real data
